revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Nerima |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = [[File:Flag of Nerima, Tokyo.svg|30px]] [[:en:Nerima|Nerima]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]] |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Nerima-ku in Tokyo Prefecture Ja.svg|100px|Location of Nerima in Tokyo]] |below = |group1 = Districts |list1 = {{Navbox|border=child |group1 = Nerima Area |list1 = * Hayamiya * Hazawa * Heiwadai * Hikawadai * Kitamachi * Nerima * Nishiki * Sakaemachi * Sakuradai |group2 = Kaminerima Area |list2 = * Asahimachi * Doshida * Haruhichō * Hikarigaoka * Mukōyama * Nukui * Tagara * Takamatsu |group3 = Nakaarai Area |list3 = * Nakamura * Nakamurakita * Nakamuraminami * Toyotamakami * Toyotamakita * Toyotamaminami * Toyotamanaka |group4 = Kamiitabashi Area |list4 = * [[:en:Asahigaoka|Asahigaoka]] * [[:en:Kotakechō|Kotakechō]] |group5 = Shakujii Area |list5 = * Fujimidai * Kamishakujii * Kamishakujiiminami-chō * Miharadai * Minamitanaka * Sekimachikita * Sekimachihigashi * Sekimachiminami * Shakujii-chō * Shakujiidai * Shimoshakujii * Tachinochō * Takanodai * Tanihara |group6 = Ōizumi Area |list6 = * Higashiōizumi * Minamiōizumi * Nishiōizumi * Nishiōizumimachi * [[:en:Ōizumimachi|Ōizumimachi]] * Ōizumigakuen-chō }} |group2 = Major stations |list2 = * [[:en:Kotake-mukaihara Station|Kotake-mukaihara]] (Metro, Seibu) * [[:en:Nerima Station|Nerima]] (Toei, Seibu) * [[:en:Toshimaen Station|Toshimaen]] (Toei, Seibu) |group3=Education |list3= *[[:en:Musashino Academia Musicae|Musashino Academia Musicae]] *[[:en:Musashi University|Musashi University]] *[[:en:Nihon University|Nihon University]] <small>Ekoda campus</small> *[[:en:Sophia University|Sophia University]] <small>Shakujii campus</small> |group4=Landmarks |list4= *[[:en:Hikarigaoka Park|Hikarigaoka Park]] *[[:en:Jōhoku-Chūō Park|Jōhoku-Chūō Park]] *[[:en:Shakujii Park|Shakujii Park]] *[[:en:Toshimaen|Toshimaen]] }}<noinclude>
